Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2000 "HARDHATMACK-0400-2000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Hard Hat Mack.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which zeroes out the tape buffer to allow the game to run correctly. It then jumps to the entry point at $2000 (it couldn't use RTS because of the zeroing overwriting the boot code).
